title: Toy Clean-Up Vacuum for Children – Works with LEGO Bricks, LOL Doll Accessories & More – For Boys and Girls Aged 4–9 (PB-2101-UK)
features: Fun Way to Tidy: Encourages children aged 4+ to clean up after play in a fun, hands-on way.
Strong Suction: Easily collects small toy bricks, accessories, and bits from carpets, rugs, and hard floors.
Cleaner Toys, Cleaner Floors: Built-in filter separates dust, fluff, and pet hair from the toys themselves.
Easy to Use: Lightweight and simple to steer — children can move it about with ease.
Teaches Responsibility: Helps kids build great habits by turning tidying into a game.
Big Capacity: See-through container holds plenty of bricks and clutter before needing to empty.
description: Product description The Pick-Up Bricks toy vacuum makes tidying up small toys fast, fun, and fuss-free. Designed for children aged 4 and up, it easily collects LEGO bricks, LOL doll accessories, and other small bits — all while filtering out dust, dirt, and pet hair so their toys stay cleaner too. We were tired of stepping on rogue bricks ourselves, so we built a toy hoover that children want to use. It’s easy to manoeuvre, super satisfying to use, and secretly teaches kids to tidy up after themselves. Please note: not suitable for Duplo bricks (they’re a bit too big — and not as much of a pain to pick up!). Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3
